content.text: I'll help you work on the JacksonDatabind-13 project. Let me start by checking the environment and understanding the current state.

todos.content: Set up environment: export TZ and check build.xml bridge
Run initial test to check if it fails (as expected)
If test passes, revert to buggy code state
Analyze requirement.feature to understand the fix needed
Modify DefaultDeserializationContext.java according to requirements
Verify fix with mvn test -Dtest=CucumberTest
Generate patch file

    </copy>
